task_description: Implement 9 UI/UX audit fixes from the senior engineer's review: active nav icon visibility, Ask OSAI card text truncation, badge contrast, search bar discoverability, dismiss action visibility, date column wrapping, topbar alignment, tab margins, and org graph legend.

verification.summary: Both typecheck and build pass cleanly. No test framework exists in this project so typecheck serves as the verification. All 22 static pages generated successfully.
